LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF HANSON BRIDGETT LLP'S MOTION TO (1) SET ASIDE DEFAULT OF DEFENDANT INFORMATIONLOGIX, LLC (2) AMEND DEFAULT JUDGMENT TO REMOVE DEFENDANT INFORMATIONLOGIX, LLC AND (3) DISMISS DEFENDANT DEFENDANT INFORMATIONLOGIX. LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. AMENDED JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. LLC is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Amended judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
